reason: This role presents regular but manageable stressors, primarily stemming from high cognitive demands, constant context-switching, and significant indirect legal liability related to AI validation protocols. While system failures can trigger immediate clinical crises, the daily work environment is largely predictable and heavily focused on navigating bureaucratic friction and hospital politics rather than dealing with bedside trauma. Ultimately, experienced professionals can handle these administrative and technical pressures without facing the chronic, overwhelming emotional labor of direct patient care.
